reasoning: Based on comprehensive analysis of available information through May 9, 2025, the probability GoPro files for bankruptcy before July 1, 2025 is extremely low. Key factors: (1) Q4 2024 results show cash position of ~$50M end of 2024, (2) Only debt is convertible notes due November 2025 - well beyond the resolution date, (3) Company actively implementing 30% expense reductions to preserve cash, (4) Growing subscription revenue provides recurring cash flow, (5) Management maintains outlook for profitability in 2026 and scheduled earnings calls through at least August 2025, (6) While stock is distressed and analysts are bearish (Morgan Stanley downgrade to Underweight Jan 2025), this reflects poor business performance not imminent liquidity crisis, (7) The 7-week window from knowledge cutoff to resolution is extremely short for bankruptcy to materialize without immediate catalyst like covenant breach or missed payment, (8) Q1 2025 earnings not released until May 12, 2025 (after knowledge cutoff) - but company would have warned if bankruptcy risk was acute. The combination of manageable near-term obligations, active cash management, and short timeframe makes bankruptcy highly unlikely.
